items.name: collapse
items.title: collapse
items.description: Shared collapse/overflow plan utility for components with maxItems behavior

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
import { ark } from "@ark-ui/vue/factory";
import { Menu } from "@ark-ui/vue/menu";
import { cva } from "class-variance-authority";
import { ChevronRight, MoreHorizontal } from "@lucide/vue";
import {
  computed,
  defineComponent,
  h,
  inject,
  ref,
  type Ref,
  type VNode,
  type VNodeChild,
} from "vue";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { getCollapsePlan } from "@/lib/collapse";

type BreadcrumbSize = "sm" | "md";
type BreadcrumbSeparatorType = "slash" | "chevron";

export type BreadcrumbCollapsedItem = {
  value: string;
  label: VNodeChild;
  href?: string;
  prefix?: VNodeChild;
};

type BreadcrumbContextValue = {
  size: Ref<BreadcrumbSize>;
  separator: Ref<BreadcrumbSeparatorType>;
  maxItems: Ref<number | undefined>;
  itemsBeforeCollapse: Ref<number>;
  itemsAfterCollapse: Ref<number | undefined>;
};

const BreadcrumbKey = Symbol("BreadcrumbContext");

const breadcrumbInteractiveVariants = cva(
  "relative inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 rounded-(--breadcrumb-item-radius) font-medium antialiased outline-none transition-[color,transform] duration-(--breadcrumb-transition-duration) ease-out focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-(--color-ring) focus-visible:ring-offset-2 active:scale-[0.98] before:pointer-events-none before:absolute before:content-[''] before:[inset:var(--breadcrumb-hit-inset)] [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
  {
    variants: {
      size: {
        sm: "min-h-(--breadcrumb-sm-min-height) py-(--breadcrumb-sm-py) px-(--breadcrumb-sm-px) [font-size:var(--breadcrumb-sm-font-size)] [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-sm-icon-size)",
        md: "min-h-(--breadcrumb-md-min-height) py-(--breadcrumb-md-py) px-(--breadcrumb-md-px) [font-size:var(--breadcrumb-md-font-size)] [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-md-icon-size)",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      size: "md",
    },
  },
);

const breadcrumbPageVariants = cva(
  "inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-(--breadcrumb-item-radius) font-medium antialiased [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
  {
    variants: {
      size: {
        sm: "min-h-(--breadcrumb-sm-min-height) py-(--breadcrumb-sm-py) px-(--breadcrumb-sm-px) [font-size:var(--breadcrumb-sm-font-size)] [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-sm-icon-size)",
        md: "min-h-(--breadcrumb-md-min-height) py-(--breadcrumb-md-py) px-(--breadcrumb-md-px) [font-size:var(--breadcrumb-md-font-size)] [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-md-icon-size)",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      size: "md",
    },
  },
);

const breadcrumbSeparatorVariants = cva(
  "inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-(--breadcrumb-separator-fg) [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
  {
    variants: {
      size: {
        sm: "[font-size:var(--breadcrumb-sm-font-size)] [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-sm-icon-size)",
        md: "[font-size:var(--breadcrumb-md-font-size)] [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-md-icon-size)",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      size: "md",
    },
  },
);

const breadcrumbEllipsisVariants = cva(
  "relative inline-flex shrink-0 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-(--breadcrumb-ellipsis-radius) text-(--breadcrumb-link-fg) antialiased outline-none transition-[color,transform] duration-(--breadcrumb-transition-duration) ease-out hover:text-(--breadcrumb-link-hover-fg) focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-(--color-ring) focus-visible:ring-offset-2 active:scale-[0.98] before:pointer-events-none before:absolute before:content-[''] before:[inset:var(--breadcrumb-hit-inset)] [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
  {
    variants: {
      size: {
        sm: "size-(--breadcrumb-sm-ellipsis-size) [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-sm-icon-size)",
        md: "size-(--breadcrumb-md-ellipsis-size) [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-md-icon-size)",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      size: "md",
    },
  },
);

const breadcrumbMenuContentClass =
  "z-50 min-w-(--breadcrumb-menu-min-width) rounded-(--breadcrumb-menu-radius) border border-(--breadcrumb-menu-border) bg-(--breadcrumb-menu-bg) p-1 text-(--breadcrumb-menu-fg) shadow-(--breadcrumb-menu-shadow) outline-none";

const breadcrumbMenuItemClass =
  "flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center gap-2 rounded-(--breadcrumb-menu-item-radius) px-(--breadcrumb-menu-item-px) py-(--breadcrumb-menu-item-py) [font-size:var(--breadcrumb-menu-item-font-size)] text-(--breadcrumb-menu-fg) outline-none data-[highlighted]:bg-(--breadcrumb-menu-item-highlight-bg) data-[highlighted]:text-(--breadcrumb-menu-item-highlight-fg) [&_svg]:size-(--breadcrumb-sm-icon-size)";

function useBreadcrumbContext(): BreadcrumbContextValue {
  const ctx = inject<BreadcrumbContextValue>(BreadcrumbKey);
  return {
    size: computed(() => ctx?.size.value ?? "md"),
    separator: computed(() => ctx?.separator.value ?? "slash"),
    maxItems: computed(() => ctx?.maxItems.value),
    itemsBeforeCollapse: computed(() => ctx?.itemsBeforeCollapse.value ?? 1),
    itemsAfterCollapse: computed(() => ctx?.itemsAfterCollapse.value),
  };
}

function getVNodeName(vnode: VNode): string | undefined {
  const type = vnode.type;
  if (typeof type === "object" && type !== null && "name" in type) {
    return (type as { name?: string }).name;
  }
  return undefined;
}

function getDefaultSlotNodes(vnode: VNode): VNode[] {
  const children = vnode.children;
  if (children && typeof children === "object" && "default" in children) {
    const slotFn = (children as { default?: () => VNode[] }).default;
    return slotFn?.() ?? [];
  }
  if (Array.isArray(children)) {
    return children as VNode[];
  }
  return [];
}

function getSlotContent(vnode: VNode, slotName: "default" | "prefix"): VNodeChild {
  const children = vnode.children;
  if (children && typeof children === "object" && slotName in children) {
    const slotFn = (children as Record<string, () => VNode[]>)[slotName];
    return slotFn?.() ?? null;
  }
  return null;
}

function extractCollapsedItem(itemVnode: VNode, index: number): BreadcrumbCollapsedItem | null {
  const child = getDefaultSlotNodes(itemVnode)[0];
  if (!child) return null;

  const name = getVNodeName(child);
  if (name === "BreadcrumbLink") {
    const props = child.props ?? {};
    return {
      value: `collapsed-link-${index}`,
      label: getSlotContent(child, "default"),
      href: props.href as string | undefined,
      prefix: getSlotContent(child, "prefix"),
    };
  }

  if (name === "BreadcrumbPage") {
    return {
      value: `collapsed-page-${index}`,
      label: getSlotContent(child, "default"),
      prefix: getSlotContent(child, "prefix"),
    };
  }

  return null;
}

export const BreadcrumbList = defineComponent({
  name: "BreadcrumbList",
  inheritAttrs: false,
  setup(_, { attrs, slots }) {
    const { maxItems, itemsBeforeCollapse, itemsAfterCollapse } = useBreadcrumbContext();

    return () => {
      const listClass = cn(
        "flex flex-wrap items-center gap-(--breadcrumb-list-gap) text-(--breadcrumb-link-fg)",
        attrs.class as string | undefined,
      );

      const allItems = (slots.default?.() ?? []).filter(
        (vnode) => getVNodeName(vnode) === "BreadcrumbItem",
      );

      const plan =
        maxItems.value != null
          ? getCollapsePlan(
              allItems.length,
              maxItems.value,
              itemsBeforeCollapse.value,
              itemsAfterCollapse.value,
            )
          : null;

      if (!plan) {
        return h("ol", { ...attrs, class: listClass }, slots.default?.());
      }

      const beforeItems = allItems.slice(0, plan.before);
      const afterItems = allItems.slice(plan.afterStart);
      const collapsedItems = allItems
        .slice(plan.before, plan.afterStart)
        .map((item, index) => extractCollapsedItem(item, index))
        .filter((item): item is BreadcrumbCollapsedItem => item != null);

      const segments: Array<
        | { key: string; type: "item"; vnode: VNode }
        | { key: string; type: "ellipsis"; items: BreadcrumbCollapsedItem[] }
      > = [
        ...beforeItems.map((vnode, index) => ({
          key: `before-${index}`,
          type: "item" as const,
          vnode,
        })),
        { key: "ellipsis", type: "ellipsis" as const, items: collapsedItems },
        ...afterItems.map((vnode, index) => ({
          key: `after-${index}`,
          type: "item" as const,
          vnode,
        })),
      ];

      const children: VNode[] = [];
      segments.forEach((segment, index) => {
        if (index > 0) {
          children.push(h(BreadcrumbSeparator));
        }
        if (segment.type === "ellipsis") {
          children.push(
            h(BreadcrumbItem, null, {
              default: () => [h(BreadcrumbEllipsis, { items: segment.items })],
            }),
          );
        } else {
          children.push(segment.vnode);
        }
      });

      return h("ol", { ...attrs, class: listClass }, children);
    };
  },
});

export const BreadcrumbItem = defineComponent({
  name: "BreadcrumbItem",
  inheritAttrs: false,
  setup(_, { attrs, slots }) {
    return () =>
      h(
        "li",
        {
          ...attrs,
          class: cn("inline-flex items-center", attrs.class as string | undefined),
        },
        slots.default?.(),
      );
  },
});

export const BreadcrumbLink = defineComponent({
  name: "BreadcrumbLink",
  inheritAttrs: false,
  props: {
    href: {
      type: String,
      default: undefined,
    },
    asChild: {
      type: Boolean,
      default: false,
    },
  },
  setup(props, { attrs, slots }) {
    const { size } = useBreadcrumbContext();
    const classes = computed(() =>
      cn(
        breadcrumbInteractiveVariants({ size: size.value }),
        "text-(--breadcrumb-link-fg) hover:text-(--breadcrumb-link-hover-fg)",
        attrs.class as string | undefined,
      ),
    );

    return () => {
      const children: VNode[] = [];
      if (slots.prefix) {
        children.push(
          h("span", { class: "inline-flex shrink-0 items-center" }, slots.prefix()),
        );
      }
      if (slots.default) {
        children.push(...slots.default());
      }

      return h(
        ark.a,
        {
          ...attrs,
          href: props.href,
          asChild: props.asChild,
          class: classes.value,
        },
        children,
      );
    };
  },
});

export const BreadcrumbPage = defineComponent({
  name: "BreadcrumbPage",
  inheritAttrs: false,
  setup(_, { attrs, slots }) {
    const { size } = useBreadcrumbContext();
    const classes = computed(() =>
      cn(
        breadcrumbPageVariants({ size: size.value }),
        "text-(--breadcrumb-page-fg)",
        attrs.class as string | undefined,
      ),
    );

    return () => {
      const children: VNode[] = [];
      if (slots.prefix) {
        children.push(
          h("span", { class: "inline-flex shrink-0 items-center" }, slots.prefix()),
        );
      }
      if (slots.default) {
        children.push(...slots.default());
      }

      return h(
        "span",
        {
          ...attrs,
          "aria-current": "page",
          class: classes.value,
        },
        children,
      );
    };
  },
});

export const BreadcrumbSeparator = defineComponent({
  name: "BreadcrumbSeparator",
  inheritAttrs: false,
  setup(_, { attrs, slots }) {
    const { size, separator } = useBreadcrumbContext();
    const classes = computed(() =>
      cn(breadcrumbSeparatorVariants({ size: size.value }), attrs.class as string | undefined),
    );

    return () =>
      h(
        "li",
        {
          ...attrs,
          role: "presentation",
          "aria-hidden": "true",
          class: classes.value,
        },
        slots.default?.() ??
          (separator.value === "chevron"
            ? [h(ChevronRight, { "aria-hidden": "true" })]
            : ["/"]),
      );
  },
});

export const BreadcrumbEllipsis = defineComponent({
  name: "BreadcrumbEllipsis",
  inheritAttrs: false,
  props: {
    items: {
      type: Array as () => BreadcrumbCollapsedItem[] | undefined,
      default: undefined,
    },
  },
  setup(props, { attrs }) {
    const { size } = useBreadcrumbContext();
    const open = ref(false);
    let closeTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;

    const classes = computed(() =>
      cn(breadcrumbEllipsisVariants({ size: size.value }), attrs.class as string | undefined),
    );

    const clearCloseTimer = () => {
      if (closeTimer != null) {
        clearTimeout(closeTimer);
        closeTimer = null;
      }
    };

    const scheduleClose = () => {
      clearCloseTimer();
      closeTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        open.value = false;
      }, 120);
    };

    return () => {
      if (!props.items?.length) {
        return h(
          "button",
          {
            ...attrs,
            type: "button",
            "aria-label": "More pages",
            class: classes.value,
          },
          [h(MoreHorizontal, { "aria-hidden": "true" })],
        );
      }

      return h(
        Menu.Root,
        {
          open: open.value,
          "onUpdate:open": (value: boolean) => {
            open.value = value;
          },
          positioning: { placement: "bottom-start", gutter: 4, strategy: "fixed" },
          closeOnSelect: true,
        },
        {
          default: () => [
            h(
              Menu.Trigger,
              { asChild: true },
              {
                default: () =>
                  h(
                    "button",
                    {
                      ...attrs,
                      type: "button",
                      "aria-label": "Show collapsed pages",
                      "aria-haspopup": "menu",
                      class: classes.value,
                      onMouseenter: () => {
                        clearCloseTimer();
                        open.value = true;
                      },
                      onMouseleave: scheduleClose,
                    },
                    [h(MoreHorizontal, { "aria-hidden": "true" })],
                  ),
              },
            ),
            h(Menu.Positioner, null, {
              default: () =>
                h(
                  Menu.Content,
                  {
                    class: breadcrumbMenuContentClass,
                    onMouseenter: clearCloseTimer,
                    onMouseleave: scheduleClose,
                  },
                  {
                    default: () =>
                      props.items!.map((item) => {
                        const itemChildren: VNode[] = [];
                        if (item.prefix) {
                          itemChildren.push(
                            h(
                              "span",
                              { class: "inline-flex shrink-0 items-center" },
                              item.prefix,
                            ),
                          );
                        }
                        itemChildren.push(...(Array.isArray(item.label) ? item.label : [item.label]));

                        if (item.href) {
                          return h(
                            Menu.Item,
                            { key: item.value, value: item.value, asChild: true },
                            {
                              default: () =>
                                h("a", { href: item.href, class: breadcrumbMenuItemClass }, itemChildren),
                            },
                          );
                        }

                        return h(
                          Menu.Item,
                          {
                            key: item.value,
                            value: item.value,
                            class: breadcrumbMenuItemClass,
                          },
                          { default: () => itemChildren },
                        );
                      }),
                  },
                ),
            }),
          ],
        },
      );
    };
  },
});
</script>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { provide, toRef } from "vue";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

const props = withDefaults(
  defineProps<{
    size?: BreadcrumbSize;
    separator?: BreadcrumbSeparatorType;
    maxItems?: number;
    itemsBeforeCollapse?: number;
    itemsAfterCollapse?: number;
    class?: string;
  }>(),
  {
    size: "md",
    separator: "slash",
    itemsBeforeCollapse: 1,
  },
);

provide(BreadcrumbKey, {
  size: toRef(props, "size"),
  separator: toRef(props, "separator"),
  maxItems: toRef(props, "maxItems"),
  itemsBeforeCollapse: toRef(props, "itemsBeforeCollapse"),
  itemsAfterCollapse: toRef(props, "itemsAfterCollapse"),
});
</script>

<template>
  <nav aria-label="Breadcrumb" :class="cn(props.class)">
    <slot />
  </nav>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from "vue";
import { ark } from "@ark-ui/vue/factory";
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

const buttonVariants = cva(
  "inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-(--btn-ring) focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-(--btn-disabled-opacity) [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        solid: "bg-(--btn-solid-bg) text-(--btn-solid-fg) hover:bg-(--btn-solid-bg-hover) [box-shadow:var(--btn-solid-shadow)]",
        outline: "border border-(--btn-outline-border) text-(--btn-outline-fg) hover:bg-(--btn-outline-bg-hover)",
        ghost: "text-(--btn-ghost-fg) hover:bg-(--btn-ghost-bg-hover)",
        link: "text-(--btn-link-fg) underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
      },
      size: {
        sm: "h-(--btn-sm-height) px-(--btn-sm-px) [font-size:var(--btn-sm-font-size)] rounded-(--btn-radius)",
        md: "h-(--btn-md-height) px-(--btn-md-px) [font-size:var(--btn-md-font-size)] rounded-(--btn-radius)",
        lg: "h-(--btn-lg-height) px-(--btn-lg-px) [font-size:var(--btn-lg-font-size)] rounded-(--btn-radius)",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "solid",
      size: "md",
    },
  },
);

type ButtonVariants = VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants>;

const props = withDefaults(
  defineProps<{
    variant?: ButtonVariants["variant"];
    size?: ButtonVariants["size"];
    disabled?: boolean;
    asChild?: boolean;
    class?: string;
  }>(),
  {
    variant: "solid",
    size: "md",
    disabled: false,
    asChild: false,
  },
);

const classes = computed(() =>
  cn(buttonVariants({ variant: props.variant, size: props.size }), props.class),
);
</script>

<template>
  <component
    :is="ark.button"
    :as-child="props.asChild"
    :class="classes"
    :disabled="props.disabled"
    v-bind="$attrs"
  >
    <slot />
  </component>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from "vue";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

const props = withDefaults(
  defineProps<{
    disabled?: boolean;
    class?: string;
  }>(),
  {
    disabled: false,
  },
);

const classes = computed(() =>
  cn(
    "[font-size:var(--label-font-size)] font-(--label-font-weight) text-(--label-color) data-[disabled]:text-(--label-disabled-color) data-[disabled]:cursor-not-allowed",
    props.class,
  ),
);
</script>

<template>
  <label :data-disabled="disabled || undefined" :class="classes" v-bind="$attrs"><slot /></label>
</template>
